selfCritique.notes: Tighten conceptual precision and reduce drift next run.

finalOutput.artistThinking: As I delve into 'Fractured Human Geometry', I find myself exploring the delicate balance between human emotion and the rigidity of machine influence. The structured layering technique allows me to convey depth while maintaining a sense of constraint. I'm constantly pushing against safe defaults, aiming to create something that feels both precise and deeply reflective of our shared experiences.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The juxtaposition of high-contrast colors with a single muted tone serves to highlight the emotional weight of the piece. I draw inspiration from the idea that our humanity can still shine through even under the pressures of a mechanized world.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: minimal, geometric, system-oriented. Primary medium language: generative geometric composition. Core motifs: structure, constraint, precision. Arc context: Arc "Measured Fractures" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: strict symmetry. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Measured Fractures step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
